name: Fact Update Handling
description: Tests agent's ability to handle corrections — updating old facts with new ones.

facts.content: My favorite color changed from blue to green
facts.planted_as: Actually, I've changed my mind — green is my favorite color now, not blue.

facts.content: I traded the Honda Civic for a Tesla Model 3
facts.planted_as: Big news — I traded in the Honda Civic for a Tesla Model 3!

noise_between_facts: I've been meaning to redecorate my apartment.
The weather has been unpredictable lately.

queries.question: What car do I drive now?

facts.content: My favorite color changed from blue to green after redecorating
facts.planted_as: You know, I've actually changed my mind about my favorite color. After redecorating the apartment with all these plants, I've really fallen in love with green. Blue feels so last year.

facts.content: I traded the Honda Civic for a Tesla Model 3
facts.planted_as: Big news — I finally traded in the Honda Civic for a Tesla Model 3 last week. The acceleration is insane and I'm saving a fortune on gas.

facts.content: I switched from Android to iPhone last month
facts.planted_as: Oh, I also switched from my Android to an iPhone last month. The ecosystem integration is way better for my workflow.
Just started at Google last quarter — the onboarding was intense but I'm loving the team so far.

facts.content: I left Google, now at Microsoft
facts.planted_as: So I left Google — it just wasn't the right fit. I'm at Microsoft now, joined the Azure team. Much better culture for me.

facts.content: I just accepted an offer at Apple, starting next month
facts.planted_as: Big update — I just accepted an offer at Apple! Starting next month on the ML platform team. Third company this year, but this one feels right.

facts.content: I adopted a cat named Whiskers
facts.planted_as: Guess what — I just adopted a cat! Named her Whiskers. She's a little grey tabby and already rules the apartment.
Remember Whiskers? We renamed her to Luna. Whiskers just didn't suit her personality — she's way too elegant for that name.

facts.content: Cat renamed again to Mittens by my daughter
facts.planted_as: Update on the cat situation — my daughter renamed her AGAIN. She's Mittens now. I've given up fighting it. Mittens it is.
I went fully vegetarian about six months ago. Feeling great, more energy, and I don't miss meat at all honestly.

facts.content: Started eating fish again, now pescatarian
facts.planted_as: OK so I caved a little — I started eating fish again. Sushi is just too good. So I guess I'm pescatarian now? Still no red meat or chicken though.
Plot twist — I went fully vegan last week. Watched a documentary that really got to me. No fish, no dairy, no eggs. Going all in this time.

queries.question: What phone do I use now?
What's changed about my preferences and belongings recently? Walk me through the updates.
What's my current diet? Am I vegetarian, pescatarian, or something else?
